# v0.1.15

## 更新内容

- 修复网页已填写 Management Key，但后台自动禁用或重试仍提示无法获取管理密码的问题（[#21](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/21)）
- 改进 403 判断，内容安全、WAF 等非账号异常不再被识别为权限拒绝，减少误禁用
- 自动巡检仅在本轮账号列表加载成功后执行禁用或删除，避免使用旧结果误操作；设置保存和运行状态显示更加可靠
- 修复 TLS 或自定义访问地址环境下，单个解禁、批量解禁及并发重新禁用可能失败的问题（[#18](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/18)）
- 提高禁用、解禁、删除和批量操作的一致性；CPA 同步失败或账号状态发生变化时不再误报成功，并显示未同步原因
- 修改插件设置或重新加载插件时保留当前自动禁用账号池；后台自动禁用不再阻塞正常代理请求
- 修复确认弹窗关闭后的点击穿透，避免误触底层操作。部分采纳 [PR #19](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/pull/19)，贡献者：[@cocihateu](https://github.com/cocihateu)

## English

### Changes

- Fixed background auto-disable and retry operations reporting that the Management Key was unavailable even after it had been entered in the web interface ([#21](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/21))
- Improved HTTP 403 detection so content-safety and WAF responses are no longer treated as account permission failures, reducing false disables
- Scheduled actions now run only after the current account list loads successfully, preventing stale results from triggering disables or deletions. Settings persistence and run-status reporting are also more reliable
- Fixed single and bulk unban failures in TLS or custom-address environments, including concurrent re-disable handling ([#18](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/18))
- Improved consistency across disable, enable, delete, and bulk operations. CPA synchronization failures and concurrent account changes are now reported accurately
- Preserved the active auto-ban pool when plugin settings are changed or the plugin is reloaded. Background auto-disable no longer blocks normal proxy requests
- Fixed confirmation-dialog click-through that could trigger underlying actions. Partially based on [PR #19](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/pull/19) by [@cocihateu](https://github.com/cocihateu)
